name: Cinema 4D MCP Server
what_it_does: Cinema 4D MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Cinema 4D — Maxon's professional 3D modeling, animation, and visual effects software. Enables creating and modifying 3D scenes, managing objects and materials, setting keyframes for animation, running renders, and integrating AI-directed 3D content creation into professional motion graphics and VFX workflows. Requires Cinema 4D running locally.
use_cases: Creating 3D objects and scenes from design descriptions from creative agents
Modifying materials and textures in Cinema 4D from design iteration agents
Setting animation keyframes for motion graphics from animation agents
Automating repetitive 3D modeling tasks from production pipeline agents
Adjusting camera and lighting settings from cinematography agents
Generating variations of 3D assets from creative exploration agents
not_for: Teams without Cinema 4D license (expensive commercial software)
Game asset creation optimized for real-time (use Blender or game-engine tools for game assets)
Simple 2D motion graphics (use After Effects or similar for 2D work)
best_when: A motion graphics artist or 3D animator using Cinema 4D wants AI assistance with 3D scene creation — automating object placement, material application, or animation setup tasks.
avoid_when: You use Blender, Maya, 3ds Max, or other 3D software, or lack a Cinema 4D license.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with running Cinema 4D instance via Python API (c4d module). Cinema 4D must be running with the MCP plugin configured.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Cinema 4D commercial license required (~$720/year subscription or $3,995 perpetual)
pricing.paid_tiers: MCP server is free; Cinema 4D license required
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Cinema 4D requires Maxon subscription or perpetual license.

performance.rate_limits: Local Cinema 4D process — no external rate limits; rendering can take minutes to hours

known_agent_gotchas: Cinema 4D must be running with plugin installed — not a standalone server
Cinema 4D license required — expensive commercial software
Cinema 4D Python API (c4d module) is version-specific — verify API compatibility with installed C4D version
Rendering commands are non-blocking — agent must poll render completion status
3D scene state must be saved/loaded carefully to avoid losing work in case of crash
Cinema 4D on Windows vs macOS may have different plugin behavior — test on target platform
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Cinema 4D process. No network calls. No credentials. 3D scene files stored locally. Proprietary 3D assets — protect local storage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local C4D process. No network. Proprietary 3D assets on local disk. Protect local storage for valuable assets.
